name: Whitecap Mountains Resort
description: Why is Whitecap the best for Midwest skiing? It’s our 48 runs across three peaks and that authentic "Ski Country" vibe in the ancient Penokee Mountains. No corporate feel here: just pure Northwoods magic and down-home Wisconsin hospitality. Whitecap Mountains Resort has been announced as a new Indy Pass member for the 26/27 season. Access to this mountain does not begin until fall/winter 2026/27.
